mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, social_type, social_id, social_name, social_avatar, access_token, refresh_token, token_expire_time, bind_time, update_time FROM sys_social_bind WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY bind_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_social_bind ( user_id, social_type, social_id, social_name, social_avatar, access_token, refresh_token, token_expire_time, bind_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{socialType}, #{socialId}, #{socialName}, #{socialAvatar}, #{accessToken}, #{refreshToken}, #{tokenExpireTime}, NOW(), NOW() )
